title: Confluence vs Monday.com
description: Compare Confluence vs Monday.com in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right project management tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Monday.com emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.4/5 rating compared to 4.1/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Confluence or Monday.com?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Monday.com edges ahead with a 4.4/5 rating. Confluence excels at Create, share, and organize team knowledge with connected documentation, while Monday.com is stronger for monday.com is a highly visual work and project management platform built on a fl.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Confluence and Monday.com?
faqs.answer: Confluence and Monday.com differ in pricing (Free–$11/user/mo vs $10–$20/seat/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Confluence cheaper than Monday.com?
faqs.answer: Confluence starts at Free–$11/user/mo while Monday.com starts at $10–$20/seat/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Confluence or Monday.com?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for project management. Monday.com scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Confluence and Monday.com together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Confluence or Monday.com?
faqs.answer: Both Confluence and Monday.com prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which project management tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Confluence for large teams, while Monday.com may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Free–$11/user/mo pricing.
